log: ══ ROUND 1 ══
--- Khenra — Iron Concentration --- HP: 67/67 | AC: 14
REASONING: ROUND 1: 5 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):20+1=21 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):18+1=19 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):11+1=12 vs DC 15] FAIL! (had advantage)
→ Cult Fanatic: WIS save [d20(ADV):17+1=18 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ Mage: WIS save [d20:13+4=17 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ 1/5 targets affected.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Ally charmed by Hypnotic Pattern! Shaking Cult Fanatic awake.
ACTION: Shakes Cult Fanatic awake! Charmed + Incapacitated removed.
--- Cult Fanatic --- HP: 33/33 | AC: 13
REASONING: Round 1: Too far for melee. Spiritual Weapon + ranged.
MOVEMENT: Moves toward Khenra — Iron Concentration.
ACTION: Cast Spiritual Weapon (Level 2 slot). melee_spell attack vs Khenra — Iron Concentration.
→ melee_spell attack: [d20:11+3=14 vs AC 14] HIT! 4casting_mod force damage. Khenra — Iron Concentration HP: NaN/67
→ Concentration save: BROKEN! Hypnotic Pattern ends!
ACTION: Cast Sacred Flame (Level 0). DC 11 DEX save on Khenra — Iron Concentration.
→ Khenra — Iron Concentration: DEX save [d20:3+7=10 vs DC 11] FAIL! 8 radiant damage. HP: NaN/67
